title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Asian Development Bank Act, 1966. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint
footnote: 1. 19th, December, 1966, vide notification No. S.O. 3803(E), dated 8th, December, 1966, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
